evidence_contract.baseline: Phase 4 local diagnostics and within-P8h adjacent-rung comparisons; P8g no-resampling is historical context only.
evidence_contract.primary_criterion: Select the smallest count passing finite, trusted-GPU, transport, runtime, five-seed MC SE, and adjacent-rung gates at every Stage 0 horizon, or emit an explicit blocker.
evidence_contract.question: What Stage 0 prefix particle counts are adequate for the P8h OT-resampled scalar-SV route under trusted GPU execution?

nonclaims: P8h Stage 0 prefix particle-count tuning gate only

run_manifest.command: scripts/filtering_value_gradient_benchmark_run_p8d_numeric.py --p8h-particle-tuning-stage0 --row actual_sv --algorithm ledh_pfpf_alg1_ukf_current --p8h-resampling-route ot_sinkhorn_barycentric_covariance_carry --coordinate canonical_unconstrained --horizons 16,32 --particles 5 --seeds 81120,81121,81122,81123,81124 --device gpu --g0-manifest docs/plans/bayesfilter-filtering-value-gradient-benchmark-p8g-phase0-gpu-probe-result-2026-06-15.md --runtime-budget-seconds 1800 --p8h-profile-manifest-phase P8I_PHASE3_GPU_SCALING_SELECTED_N5 --p8h-profile-manifest-plan docs/plans/bayesfilter-filtering-value-gradient-benchmark-p8i-phase3-gpu-scaling-subplan-2026-06-16.md --output-json docs/plans/bayesfilter-filtering-value-gradient-benchmark-p8i-phase3-gpu-scaling-selected-n5-2026-06-16.json --output-csv docs/plans/bayesfilter-filtering-value-gradient-benchmark-p8i-phase3-gpu-scaling-selected-n5-2026-06-16.csv --selected-blocked-csv docs/plans/bayesfilter-filtering-value-gradient-benchmark-p8i-phase3-gpu-scaling-selected-n5-selected-blocked-2026-06-16.csv
run_manifest.environment: TensorFlow/TensorFlow Probability P8I_PHASE3_GPU_SCALING_SELECTED_N5 particle profile harness

nonclaims: blocked Stage 0 tuning result, not selected particle-count evidence
selected_blocked.selection_rule: no evaluated P8h Stage 0 count passed all gates
